hero.title: Museum-Level Care for Every Piece
hero.subtitle: White-glove receiving, storage, delivery, and installation built exclusively for interior designers. From showroom to final placement — tracked, verified, and flawless.

items.title: Receiving & Inspection
items.description: Every piece photographed, condition-documented, and logged the moment it arrives at our High Point facility.

items.title: Climate-Controlled Storage
items.description: Secure warehousing until your client's home is ready — organized by project, room, and install sequence.

items.title: White-Glove Delivery
items.description: Trained two-person crews deliver to the exact room with floor and wall protection on every job.

items.title: On-Site Installation
items.description: Assembly, placement to your floor plan, and complete packaging removal — down to the inch.

items.title: Real-Time Tracking
items.description: Designers and clients see every piece's location, condition, and stage through our project portal.

items.title: Damage Documentation
items.description: Full audit trail from receiving through installation with verified condition at every handoff.

portalSection.title: See Every Piece. Every Stage. Every Room.
portalSection.description: Our inventory management system gives you and your clients complete visibility — from the receiving dock to the final install. Track condition verification, location updates, and room assignments in real time.
portalSection.sampleCaption: Sample from our live demo project

ctaSection.title: Ready to Elevate Your Next Project?
ctaSection.subtitle: Tell us about your job and we'll provide a detailed quote — typically within one business day.
